event.summary: Classified 6 docs: 4 invoices, 1 bank statement, 1 open-banking feed. 47 line items extracted. All sources cited.
Plan: [1] Reconstruct P&L (12mo), [2] Compute current ratio + debt-to-equity, [3] Assess sector risk (F&B Tunis), [4] Write executive summary.
computeKPI(gross_margin, 12mo) → 34.2%. queryPeerBenchmarks(food, micro) → sector avg 31.4%. flagRisk(cash_concentration, medium). renderPassportSection(executive_summary) ✓
NEEDS_REVISION: Revenue figure on 2025-11-01 invoice not reconciled with bank flow. Sending back to executor.
Revision loop: reconciled Nov invoice — rounding difference 12 TND, within tolerance. Passport sections updated.
APPROVED. All 47 claims verified against source docs. P&L reconciles to ±0.1% of bank flows.
Sanad Passport signed (Ed25519). Credit score: 72/100. XAI log written. Passport ID: pp_cafe_wafa_2026.

passport.summary: Café El Wafa is a profitable food & beverage micro-enterprise with 34.2% gross margin, above the 31.4% sector average. Cash flow is regular and predictable. Main risk: revenue concentration (top 3 months = 61% of annual). Recommended product: BFR loan 30k TND, 18–24 months.

risks.evidence: Records reconstructed from bank flows + invoices

passport.xaiLog: The formatter classified 6 documents in 0.8s. The orchestrator chose a working-capital analysis plan based on the goal. The executor computed all KPIs deterministically from line items — no LLM inference for numeric values. The reviewer caught a reconciliation gap in Nov invoice and triggered a revision loop. After reconciliation the gap was 12 TND (0.07%) — within tolerance. Final score 72/100 weights: cash flow regularity (30%), margin vs benchmark (25%), debt level (20%), doc completeness (15%), sector risk (10%).
